---
title: "talks"
---

Here are some talks I have given over the years, with some links to the slides/videos where available:

- Engineering the Biodiversity Intactness Index (NHM, University of Glasgow, March 2026).

- BFL Code Reviews Workshop (Biodiversity Futures Lab, November 2025) [[slides](https://connor-duffin.github.io/bfl-code-reviews-workshop/#/)].

- NHM R Unit Testing Workshop (Natural History Museum R Group, May 2025) [[slides](https://connor-duffin.github.io/unit-testing-talk/#/title-slide)].

- Statistical Finite Element Methods from my past academic life (e.g. SIAM UQ 2024, Warwick Algorithms 2024, February 2024, ICIAM 2023, IMSI 2022, etc). See below for a [talk from the DARE ARC Centre of Excellence](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8DKPUMgTbGU).

  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/-_ydQvOCBOc?si=OkhV-PylYgmPXN7Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
